item.title: Hermes - Rich Web
item.description: Usually, easy reachable articles and videos, related to various topics, are not meaningful in respect to the time needed to consume them. Bubbling. Many are similar in a way that is not important which one you choose, similar ideas, nearly identical story flow. Shortly after consumption, I forget that I ever reached that material — no thought-provoking ideas. Like George Hotz said in one of his live sessions, I also like text-rich web pages with minimal web components — how old web looks like.

item.title: In the Beginning was the Isolation
item.description:
A long time ago, I thought this could be a good idea…but as always there is no time. No time. Then this happened.

Experts say this is the largest pandemic since 1918. Countries around the globe are under lockdown for a few months. Everyone is in isolation and now you have to fill all that time. Then this site comes to life…
